title: I'm Used to It
overview: Around ten years ago, gates that connected our world to another dimension began to appear, leading to the rise of hunters who would traverse these gates to fight the magic beasts within. Sung Jinwoo, E-Rank hunter, is the weakest of them all.

title: If I Had One More Chance
overview: Jinwoo and his party appear to have cleared a low-level dungeon, when a hidden path to an unfamiliar temple is revealed. There they encounter a set of commandments and a group of monsters that cause them absolute despair.

title: It's Like a Game
overview: Jinwoo remains behind in the temple dungeon to save his few surviving party members, and with a swing from the god statue's blade, his life comes to an end—or so it seems, before he wakes up in a hospital bed.

title: I've Gotta Get Stronger
overview: Having entered the instance dungeon located inside the subway, Jinwoo levels up time and time again by fighting waves of magic beasts. As he gradually makes his way forward, he finds a long stairway leading deeper underground.

title: A Pretty Good Deal
overview: Jinwoo joins a party led by Hwang Dongsuk to meet the headcount necessary for a C-Rank dungeon. Joined by another temporary hire, Yoo Jinho, the party defeats beasts without much trouble, but Jinwoo has suspicions about the group's lack of a healer.

title: The Real Hunt Begins
overview: While the C-Rank dungeon raid by Jinwoo and the others seems to be progressing well, the moment they step into an area covered in mana stones with a sleeping dungeon boss, things take a wrong turn.

title: Let's See How Far I Can Go
overview: As Jinwoo continues his training, he completes a daily quest one day by doing more than the quest requires, and a key that leads to a certain item appears in front of him.

title: This Is Frustrating
overview: Jinwoo answers a Hunter's Association request to take part in the raid of a D-Rank dungeon, where he encounters a few familiar faces.

title: You've Been Hiding Your Skills
overview: At the D-Rank raid, Jinwoo is reunited with four of the Cartenon Temple survivors. Together, they explore the dungeon with Kang Taeshik and his men. After splitting up, they hear a scream, and then...

title: What Is This, a Picnic?
overview: Jinwoo survives tragedy once again, but Woo Jinchul warns him that Hwang Dongsoo, an S-Rank hunter, may be after his life. Determined to grow stronger, Jinwoo teams up with Jinho to raid a succession of C-Rank dungeons, but they attract attention...

title: A Knight Who Defends an Empty Throne
overview: Out of the blue, a "job-change quest" pops up in Jinwoo's window. Feeling that it may help him get stronger, he enters the gate. Inside, he fights wave after wave of enemies, culminating in a knight who brings back memories of the Cartenon Temple.

title: Arise
overview: Drained from endless battle, Jinwoo sees a phantom of his past self. To overcome his own past as the Weakest Hunter of All Mankind, he struggles to find a way to clear the job-change quest.

title: You Aren't E-Rank, Are You
overview: After a scheduled meeting with Jinah's teachers, Jinwoo is asked to talk to one of her classmates, Han Song-yi, who is working as a hunter. In an effort to show her the harsh reality of the job, Jinwoo takes her to a raid designated for new hunters of the White Tiger guild.

title: I Suppose You Aren't Aware
overview: After being trapped inside of a red gate, Jinwoo has to contend with a bloodthirsty pack of ice elves who question his humanity.

title: Still a Long Way to Go
overview: Having completed his promise to Jinho to clear 19 dungeons, Jinwoo is stronger than he was when he fought the Cerberus. In order to gather the ingredients for the Elixir of Life and save his mother, he once again enters the S-Rank Demon's Castle dungeon.

title: I Need to Stop Faking
overview: Jinwoo realizes that he'll need to become even stronger in order to clear the Demon's Castle and decides to have his hunter rank reassessed.

title: This Is What We're Trained to Do
overview: Before attempting to finish the Demon's Castle, Jinwoo decides to earn some money to help prepare.

title: Don't Look Down on My Guys
overview: The Hunters Guild strike team is confronting the high orc shaman Kargalgan when Jinwoo crashes the fight.

title: The 10th S-Rank Hunter
overview: Jinwoo officially becomes an S-Rank hunter, allowing him to finalize his preparations for the Demon's Castle.

title: Looking Up Was Tiring Me Out
overview: Seeking the remaining ingredient for the Elixir of Life, Jinwoo continues his conquest of the Demon's Castle.

title: It Was All Worth It
overview: Jinwoo tries to cure his mother with the Elixir of Life while preparations for the 4th Jeju Island Raid begin.

title: We Need a Hero
overview: Sparks fly as the S-rank hunters spar in preparation for the Jeju Island raid.

title: It's Going to Get Even More Intense
overview: As the S-Rank hunters continue fighting, they're confronted by a new magic beast resembling a humanoid ant.

title: Are You the King of Humans
overview: Jinwoo arrives at Jeju Island to save the S-Rank hunters, but to do that he'll have to face the Ant King.

title: On to the Next Target
overview: After no shortage of hardship, the 4th Jeju Island raid comes to a close. But for Jinwoo, the hunt never ends.
